title: Biden passes the torch to Harris at DNC
shortDescription: President Biden was supposed to shine as the Democratic nominee. Instead he passed the torch to Kamala Harris. Susan Page analyzes the night.

title: Biden touts VP Kamala Harris' 'enormous integrity'
shortDescription: President Joe Biden's high praise of Vice President Kamala Harris tied a bow on the end of the Democratic National Convention's first night.

title: Joe Biden's convention speech: Once a launchpad, now his swan song
shortDescription: This had to sting: The race was transformed, and Democratic prospects surged the instant he stepped back from being the nominee.

title: 'I gave my best to you': Watch as Biden recounts career in DNC speech
shortDescription: President Joe Biden spoke at the Democratic National Convention, capping off the first night of the historic proceedings. Watch his full speech here.

title: Biden's goodbye, Hillary's rallying speech lead DNC Day 1 takeaways
shortDescription: President Biden wiped away tears after embracing his daughter, Ashley Biden, who introduced him to delegates, who've gathered in Chicago.

title: Watch: Georgia Sen. Raphael Warnock calls out voter suppression at DNC
shortDescription: Georgia Senator Raphael Warnock spoke at the 2024 Democratic National Convention in Chicago Monday. Watch the speech

title: Watch as first lady, in DNC speech, describes Biden's decision to drop out
shortDescription: First Lady Jill Biden spoke at the Democratic National Convention ahead of President Joe Biden's keynote speech in Chicago. Watch her full speech here

title: Watch Jill Biden's Democratic convention speech
shortDescription: First lady Jill Biden delivered a speech at the Democratic Party's convention in Chicago.

title: Bernie Sanders on Biden/Harris policy changes
shortDescription: Senator Bernie Sanders of Vermont discusses his views on the Biden administration's health care reform policies.

title: Hillary Clinton calls Trump selfish in speech endorsing Harris: Watch
shortDescription: Hillary Clinton emphasized Monday night that Kamala Harris is the one to defeat Donald Trump this election year. Watch Clinton's full speech here.

title: Watch: UAW President Shawn Fain calls Trump a 'scab', supports Harris
shortDescription: United Auto Workers President Shawn Fain endorsed Kamala Harris during the opening night of the DNC in Chicago.
